observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with mechanical cut
Visual pattern suggesting cut in leather surface
Localized deviation from normal leather appearance
mechanism_explanation: Sharp edge contact during handling or processing severs material fibers.
severity_visual_description: critical cut in leather surface visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace cutting tools and adjust blade clearance.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the cut in leather surface would be absent and surface appears normal.
